metaTitle: Spider Control NYC | Spider Extermination | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional spider removal and prevention in NYC. All spider species. Free inspection. 30-day guarantee. Licensed exterminators starting at $125. Call now.
h1: Spider Control in NYC — Removed and Kept Out
heroParagraph: Most spiders in NYC are harmless — but that doesn't make them welcome houseguests. Heavy spider activity usually signals an underlying insect population that spiders are feeding on. Our spider control programs address both: treating the spiders present and eliminating the prey insects attracting them, with perimeter barrier treatments to prevent new spiders from entering.
